    A

    addFriend(String) - Method in class model.User
    Adds a friend identifier.
    addFriendship(String, String) - Method in class model.SocialNetwork
    Adds an undirected friendship between two existing users.
    addFriendToCurrentUser(String) - Method in class service.FriendService
    Adds a friendship between the current user and another user.
    addUser(User) - Method in class model.SocialNetwork
    Adds a user and updates the attribute indexes.
    app - package app
    Application entry points and object composition.
    AppContext - Class in ui.javafx
    Holds shared application objects for JavaFX controllers.
    AppContext(SocialNetwork, Session, AuthService, UserService, FriendService, RecommendationService, NetworkFileManager) - Constructor for class ui.javafx.AppContext
    Creates a controller context.
    AppController - Interface in ui.javafx.controller
    Contract implemented by controllers that receive application-level dependencies after their FXML view is loaded.
    areFriends(String, String) - Method in class service.FriendService
    Tests whether two existing users are friends.
    AuthService - Class in service
    Provides user registration, login, logout, and user-ID availability checks.
    AuthService(SocialNetwork, Session) - Constructor for class service.AuthService
    Creates an authentication service.

    C

    clear() - Method in class model.SocialNetwork
    Removes all users, friendships, and index entries.
    containsUser(String) - Method in class model.SocialNetwork
    Tests whether a user ID exists.
    createContext() - Method in class app.SocialNetworkApp
    Creates a JavaFX context containing the application's shared objects.

    D

    DashboardController - Class in ui.javafx.controller
    Controls dashboard navigation, child views, and logout.
    DashboardController() - Constructor for class ui.javafx.controller.DashboardController
    Creates a dashboard controller for use by the FXML loader.

    F

    filterCurrentUserFriendsByHometown(String) - Method in class service.FriendService
    Filters the current user's friends by exact hometown.
    filterCurrentUserFriendsByWorkplace(String) - Method in class service.FriendService
    Filters the current user's friends by exact workplace.
    findUsersByHometown(String) - Method in class service.UserService
    Finds users by hometown.
    findUsersByWorkplace(String) - Method in class service.UserService
    Finds users by workplace.
    FriendsController - Class in ui.javafx.controller
    Controls friend listing, searching, filtering, relationship inspection, and add/remove operations.
    FriendsController() - Constructor for class ui.javafx.controller.FriendsController
    Creates a friends controller for use by the FXML loader.
    FriendService - Class in service
    Provides friendship queries and operations for the current session.
    FriendService(SocialNetwork, Session) - Constructor for class service.FriendService
    Creates a friendship service.

    G

    getAllUsers() - Method in class model.SocialNetwork
    Returns a read-only view of all users.
    getAllUsers() - Method in class service.UserService
    Returns all registered users.
    getAuthService() - Method in class ui.javafx.AppContext
    Returns the authentication service.
    getCommonFriends(String) - Method in class service.FriendService
    Finds users who are friends with both the current user and another user.
    getContext() - Method in class ui.javafx.SocialNetworkFxApp
    Returns the shared application context.
    getCurrentUser() - Method in class service.UserService
    Returns the currently authenticated user.
    getCurrentUserFriends() - Method in class service.FriendService
    Returns the current user's friends.
    getCurrentUserId() - Method in class model.Session
    Returns the authenticated user's identifier.
    getFileManager() - Method in class ui.javafx.AppContext
    Returns the network file manager.
    getFriendIds() - Method in class model.User
    Returns the mutable set of friend identifiers maintained by the network model.
    getFriendService() - Method in class ui.javafx.AppContext
    Returns the friendship service.
    getFriendsOfUser(String) - Method in class service.FriendService
    Returns a user's friends, excluding the currently logged-in user.
    getHometown() - Method in class model.User
    Returns the user's hometown.
    getNetwork() - Method in class ui.javafx.AppContext
    Returns the shared social network.
    getPasswordHash() - Method in class model.User
    Returns the encoded password hash.
    getPrimaryStage() - Method in class ui.javafx.SocialNetworkFxApp
    Returns the primary JavaFX stage.
    getRecommendationService() - Method in class ui.javafx.AppContext
    Returns the recommendation service.
    getScore() - Method in class ui.javafx.controller.RecommendationsController.RecommendationRow
    Returns the recommendation score.
    getSession() - Method in class ui.javafx.AppContext
    Returns the shared session.
    getUser() - Method in class ui.javafx.controller.RecommendationsController.RecommendationRow
    Returns the recommended user.
    getUser(String) - Method in class model.SocialNetwork
    Looks up a user by ID.
    getUserById(String) - Method in class service.UserService
    Looks up a user by ID.
    getUserId() - Method in class model.User
    Returns the unique user identifier.
    getUserName() - Method in class model.User
    Returns the user's display name.
    getUsersByHometown(String) - Method in class model.SocialNetwork
    Finds users whose hometown matches case-insensitively.
    getUsersByWorkplace(String) - Method in class model.SocialNetwork
    Finds users whose workplace matches case-insensitively.
    getUserService() - Method in class ui.javafx.AppContext
    Returns the user service.
    getWorkplace() - Method in class model.User
    Returns the user's workplace.

    H

    hasFriend(String) - Method in class model.User
    Tests whether the specified user is a friend.
    hashPassword(String) - Static method in class util.PasswordUtil
    Creates a salted encoded password hash.

    I

    isLoggedIn() - Method in class model.Session
    Reports whether a user is currently authenticated.
    isUserIdTaken(String) - Method in class service.AuthService
    Tests whether a user ID is already registered.

    L

    loadFromFile(String) - Method in class persistence.NetworkFileManager
    Loads and validates a social network from a UTF-8 text file.
    login(String) - Method in class model.Session
    Marks a user as authenticated.
    login(String, String) - Method in class service.AuthService
    Authenticates a registered user.
    LoginController - Class in ui.javafx.controller
    Controls login, network import/export, registration navigation, and application exit.
    LoginController() - Constructor for class ui.javafx.controller.LoginController
    Creates a login controller for use by the FXML loader.
    logout() - Method in class model.Session
    Clears the authenticated user from the session.
    logout() - Method in class service.AuthService
    Ends the current session.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class app.Main
    Launches the JavaFX application.
    Main - Class in app
    Provides the command-line entry point for the Buongiorno application.
    model - package model
    Domain objects for users, sessions, and the social-network graph.

    N

    NetworkFileManager - Class in persistence
    Loads and saves social-network data in the application's comma-separated USER and FRIEND record format.
    NetworkFileManager() - Constructor for class persistence.NetworkFileManager
    Creates a network file manager.

    P

    PasswordUtil - Class in util
    Hashes and verifies passwords using salted PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA256.
    persistence - package persistence
    File-based persistence for social-network data.
    ProfileController - Class in ui.javafx.controller
    Controls display and editing of the current user's profile.
    ProfileController() - Constructor for class ui.javafx.controller.ProfileController
    Creates a profile controller for use by the FXML loader.

    R

    RecommendationRow(User, int) - Constructor for class ui.javafx.controller.RecommendationsController.RecommendationRow
    Creates a recommendation row.
    RecommendationsController - Class in ui.javafx.controller
    Controls display and acceptance of scored friend recommendations.
    RecommendationsController() - Constructor for class ui.javafx.controller.RecommendationsController
    Creates a recommendations controller for use by the FXML loader.
    RecommendationsController.RecommendationRow - Class in ui.javafx.controller
    Immutable table-row model containing a recommended user and score.
    RecommendationService - Class in service
    Generates friend recommendations from the current user's friends-of-friends graph.
    RecommendationService(SocialNetwork, Session) - Constructor for class service.RecommendationService
    Creates a recommendation service.
    recommendFriends() - Method in class service.RecommendationService
    Returns recommended users ordered by descending recommendation score.
    recommendFriendsWithScores() - Method in class service.RecommendationService
    Scores friend-of-friend candidates.
    register(String, String, String, String, String) - Method in class service.AuthService
    Registers a user, hashes the supplied password, and signs the user in.
    RegisterController - Class in ui.javafx.controller
    Controls user registration and navigation back to the login screen.
    RegisterController() - Constructor for class ui.javafx.controller.RegisterController
    Creates a registration controller for use by the FXML loader.
    removeFriend(String) - Method in class model.User
    Removes a friend identifier.
    removeFriendFromCurrentUser(String) - Method in class service.FriendService
    Removes a friendship between the current user and another user.
    removeFriendship(String, String) - Method in class model.SocialNetwork
    Removes an undirected friendship between two existing users.
    replaceCurrentNetworkData(SocialNetwork) - Method in class ui.javafx.AppContext
    Replaces the contents of the shared network while retaining the same network object used by all services.

    S

    saveToFile(SocialNetwork, String) - Method in class persistence.NetworkFileManager
    Saves all users and unique undirected friendships to a text file.
    searchUsers(String, String) - Method in class service.UserService
    Searches by user ID, name, workplace, or hometown.
    service - package service
    Business services for authentication, users, friendships, and recommendations.
    Session - Class in model
    Stores the identity of the user currently authenticated in the application.
    Session() - Constructor for class model.Session
    Creates a session with no authenticated user.
    setApp(SocialNetworkFxApp, AppContext) - Method in interface ui.javafx.controller.AppController
    Supplies the JavaFX application and shared context.
    setApp(SocialNetworkFxApp, AppContext) - Method in class ui.javafx.controller.DashboardController
    Supplies the JavaFX application and shared context.

    Supplies the JavaFX application and shared context.

    Supplies the JavaFX application and shared context.
    setApp(SocialNetworkFxApp, AppContext) - Method in class ui.javafx.controller.ProfileController
    Supplies the JavaFX application and shared context.
    setApp(SocialNetworkFxApp, AppContext) - Method in class ui.javafx.controller.RecommendationsController
    Supplies the JavaFX application and shared context.
    setApp(SocialNetworkFxApp, AppContext) - Method in class ui.javafx.controller.RegisterController
    Supplies the JavaFX application and shared context.
    setHometown(String) - Method in class model.User
    Updates the hometown.
    setPasswordHash(String) - Method in class model.User
    Replaces the encoded password hash.
    setUserName(String) - Method in class model.User
    Updates the display name.
    setWorkplace(String) - Method in class model.User
    Updates the workplace.
    showDashboardScreen() - Method in class ui.javafx.SocialNetworkFxApp
    Displays the dashboard and maximizes the stage.
    showLoginScreen() - Method in class ui.javafx.SocialNetworkFxApp
    Displays the login screen and sizes the stage to its content.
    showRegisterScreen() - Method in class ui.javafx.SocialNetworkFxApp
    Displays the registration screen.
    SocialNetwork - Class in model
    Stores users and undirected friendships, with secondary indexes for workplace and hometown searches.
    SocialNetwork() - Constructor for class model.SocialNetwork
    Creates an empty social network.
    SocialNetworkApp - Class in app
    Creates and connects the model, persistence, and service-layer objects used by the application.
    SocialNetworkApp() - Constructor for class app.SocialNetworkApp
    Creates an application composition root backed by an empty social network and a new session.
    SocialNetworkFxApp - Class in ui.javafx
    JavaFX application responsible for stage setup and screen navigation.
    SocialNetworkFxApp() - Constructor for class ui.javafx.SocialNetworkFxApp
    Creates the JavaFX application instance.
    start(Stage) - Method in class ui.javafx.SocialNetworkFxApp

    U

    ui.javafx - package ui.javafx
    JavaFX application setup and shared controller context.
    ui.javafx.controller - package ui.javafx.controller
    JavaFX controllers for the application's FXML views.
    updateCurrentUserProfile(String, String, String) - Method in class service.UserService
    Updates the current user's profile.
    updateUserProfile(String, String, String, String) - Method in class model.SocialNetwork
    Updates a user's profile and keeps the secondary indexes synchronized.
    User - Class in model
    Represents a social-network user and the identifiers of that user's friends.
    User(String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class model.User
    Creates a user.
    UserService - Class in service
    Provides profile access and user search operations.
    UserService(SocialNetwork, Session) - Constructor for class service.UserService
    Creates a user service.
    util - package util
    General-purpose security utilities.

    V

    verifyPassword(String, String) - Static method in class util.PasswordUtil
    Verifies a password against an encoded PBKDF2 hash.
